ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-25-2004 Continued To Apr-21-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause call for prove-up hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Susan Lee
Counsel: Ramiro Rodriguez Castro present with Plaintiff: Maria Ester Weaver
Plaintiff was sworn and examined.
The following Plaintiff exhibits were moved into evidence.
Plaintiff exhibit 1 - Police accident report.
Plaintiff exhibit 2 - Photographs of Plaintiff's vehicle.
Plaintiff exhibit 3 - Vehicle repair estimate.
Plaintiff exhibit 4 - Farmers Insurance Declaration of Policy.
Plaintiff exhibit 5 - San Francisco General Hospital emergency room diagnostic report and Docks of The Bay Medical Group report
Plaintiff exhibit 6 - Meridian Medical Group report and statement of bill.
After evidence and testimony was heard, the court took the matter under submission. Plaintiff will submitt proposed judgment to court with-in a week of this hearing.
Counsel stipulated to the return of Plaintiff's exhibits 1-6 in open court.
